{| class="wikitable sortable" data-sort-type="number"
! scope="col" | Rank !! scope="col" class="unsortable" | Entry !! scope="col" | Score !! scope="col" | Updated
|-
| style="text-align:center" | 1 || [[Example Alpha|Alpha]] || 94.2 || 2026-01-12
|-
| style="text-align:center" | 2 || [[Example Beta|Beta]] || 91.8 || 2026-02-03
|-
| colspan="2" rowspan="1" | Combined || 186.0 || 2026-03-01
|}
